eng.definition: eager or quick to argue, quarrel, or fight.
examples: His pugnacious nature often got him into fights.
The pugnacious politician was known for his fiery speeches.
She had a pugnacious attitude towards her competitors.
उसने मुद्राओं का एक विशाल संग्रह बनाया है।
पुस्तकालय में बड़ा संग्रह होता है।
मेरे पास छापों का एक संग्रह है।
